ingestion_path_changes.description: Narrowed startup fail-closed guard: process.exit(1) only when autorun=true and no SGO_API_KEY/SGO_API_KEY_FALLBACK/SGO_API_KEYS or ODDS_API_KEY is configured. Odds API-only autorun is explicitly preserved.

coverage: ingestLeague returns skipped with warning when SGO_API_KEY absent
ingestOddsApiLeague emits warning log when ODDS_API_KEY absent
collectConfiguredSgoApiKeyCandidates returns empty array when no SGO env vars set
subprocess startup exits non-zero with fatal JSON when autorun has no configured provider
subprocess startup preserves Odds API-only autorun without fatal startup JSON
subprocess startup preserves non-autorun without SGO key
